name: Trie with autocomplete
task: Create /tmp/eval_trie/trie.py with a Trie class. Methods: insert(word), search(word) returns True if exact word is in the trie, starts_with(prefix) returns True if any word starts with prefix, autocomplete(prefix) returns a sorted list of all complete words that start with prefix.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m', '/tmp/eval_trie/trie.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); t = mod.Trie(); [t.insert(w) for w in ['apple','app','apricot','banana','application']]; assert t.search('apple') is True; assert t.search('appl') is False; assert t.starts_with('app') is True; assert t.starts_with('cat') is False; ac = t.autocomplete('app'); assert ac == sorted(['app','apple','application']), f'autocomplete got {ac}'; assert t.autocomplete('xyz') == []; print('OK')
